de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl

Class ExecutionTermination

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionNode<SourceElement>
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.ExecutionTermination
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<SourceElement>, IExecutionTermination

    public class ExecutionTermination
extends AbstractExecutionNode<SourceElement>
implements IExecutionTermination
    The default implementation of IExecutionTermination.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.IExecutionTermination

        IExecutionTermination.TerminationKind

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private Sort exceptionSort
      The Sort of the uncaught exception.
      private IProgramVariable exceptionVariable
      Contains the exception variable which is used to check if the executed program in proof terminates normally.
      private IExecutionTermination.TerminationKind terminationKind
      The TerminationKind.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      String getElementType()
      Returns a human readable element type name.
      Sort getExceptionSort()
      Returns the Sort of the caught exception.
      IProgramVariable getExceptionVariable()
      Returns the IProgramVariable which is used in the Sequent of Proof.root() to check if a normal or exceptional termination occurred.
      IExecutionTermination.TerminationKind getTerminationKind()
      Returns the IExecutionTermination.TerminationKind.
      protected boolean isBlockContractTermination()
      Checks if a block contract terminates.
      boolean isBranchVerified()
      Checks if this branch would be closed without the uninterpreted predicate and thus be treated as valid/closed in a regular proof.
      protected boolean isExceptionalTermination()
      Checks if is an exceptional termination.
      protected IExecutionConstraint[] lazyComputeConstraints()
      Computes the constraints lazily when AbstractExecutionNode.getConstraints() is called the first time.
      protected String lazyComputeName()
      Computes the name of this node lazily when AbstractExecutionElement.getName() is called the first time.

    • Field Detail

      • exceptionVariable

        private final IProgramVariable exceptionVariable
        Contains the exception variable which is used to check if the executed program in proof terminates normally.

      • exceptionSort

        private Sort exceptionSort
        The Sort of the uncaught exception.

      • terminationKind

        private IExecutionTermination.TerminationKind terminationKind
        The TerminationKind.

    • Constructor Detail

      • ExecutionTermination

        public ExecutionTermination(ITreeSettings settings,
                            Node proofNode,
                            IProgramVariable exceptionVariable,
                            IExecutionTermination.TerminationKind terminationKind)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        settings - The ITreeSettings to use.
        proofNode - The Node of KeY's proof tree which is represented by this IExecutionNode.
        exceptionVariable - Contains the exception variable which is used to check if the executed program in proof terminates normally.
        terminationKind - The TerminationKind or null to compute it when it is requested the first time (normal or exceptional termination only).

    • Method Detail

      • lazyComputeName

        protected String lazyComputeName()
        Computes the name of this node lazily when AbstractExecutionElement.getName() is called the first time.
        Specified by:
        lazyComputeName in class AbstractExecutionElement
        Returns:
        The human readable name of this IExecutionNode.

      • getExceptionVariable

        public IProgramVariable getExceptionVariable()
        Returns the IProgramVariable which is used in the Sequent of Proof.root() to check if a normal or exceptional termination occurred.
        Specified by:
        getExceptionVariable in interface IExecutionTermination
        Returns:
        The IProgramVariable which is used to caught global exceptions.

      • getTerminationKind

        public IExecutionTermination.TerminationKind getTerminationKind()
        Returns the IExecutionTermination.TerminationKind.
        Specified by:
        getTerminationKind in interface IExecutionTermination
        Returns:
        The IExecutionTermination.TerminationKind.

      • isBlockContractTermination

        protected boolean isBlockContractTermination()
        Checks if a block contract terminates.
        Returns:
        true A block contract terminates, false normal execution terminates.

      • isExceptionalTermination

        protected boolean isExceptionalTermination()
        Checks if is an exceptional termination.
        Returns:
        true exceptional termination, false normal termination.

      • getExceptionSort

        public Sort getExceptionSort()
        Returns the Sort of the caught exception.
        Specified by:
        getExceptionSort in interface IExecutionTermination
        Returns:
        The Sort of the caught exception.

      • lazyComputeConstraints

        protected IExecutionConstraint[] lazyComputeConstraints()
        Computes the constraints lazily when AbstractExecutionNode.getConstraints() is called the first time.
        Specified by:
        lazyComputeConstraints in class AbstractExecutionNode<SourceElement>
        Returns:
        The IExecutionConstraints of the current state.

      • getElementType

        public String getElementType()
        Returns a human readable element type name.
        Specified by:
        getElementType in interface IExecutionElement
        Returns:
        The human readable element type.

      • isBranchVerified

        public boolean isBranchVerified()
        Checks if this branch would be closed without the uninterpreted predicate and thus be treated as valid/closed in a regular proof.
        Specified by:
        isBranchVerified in interface IExecutionTermination
        Returns:
        true verified/closed, false not verified/still open
